primary_text:
When our Birchal campaign opens in July, the waitlist goes first.

FarmThru is a farm-direct grocery store with 50+ regenerative farms, 2,000+ customers, and a model that's already working. Brookvale hub, Monday to Friday.

We're opening equity crowdfunding from $50, capped at $10K. The waitlist gets priority access when the campaign goes live.

If you want to be part of this, the time to join is before July.

Not financial advice.
headline: The waitlist goes first
description: Equity crowdfunding on Birchal, July 2026. Waitlist gets priority access.
creative_brief: Bold headline treatment on warm background. Countdown calendar graphic showing July 2026. Urgency through design clarity, not pressure.
